name: modulo
description: Premium frontend design plugin with machine-enforceable design identity. 3-tier skill system (Core/Domain/Utility) using 4-layer skill format (Decision Guidance, Award-Winning Examples, Integration Context, Anti-Patterns). Pipeline architecture of specialized agents produces Awwwards SOTD-caliber websites through Design DNA, 19 Design Archetypes, Emotional Arc, and 35-point Anti-Slop Gate enforcement. Targets Next.js, Astro, React/Vite, Tauri, and Electron.
